name: twitter-automator
description: Scheduled Twitter/X timeline collection through a browser extension and local SQLite service.

scripts.check: node --check support/api/twitter-timeline/server.js && node --check support/api/twitter-timeline/store.js && node --check support/api/twitter-timeline/scheduler.js && node --check plugins/timeline-collector/background.js && node --check plugins/timeline-collector/content-script.js
